title: mypy: 15 list-item errors (int|None in list expecting int)
description:
15 list-item errors in src/lichen/schc/headers.py where int|None values are used in bytes() constructors:
- Lines 154, 261, 264, 265, 298, 299, 356, 358

These are in reconstruct_ipv6() and reconstruct_udp() functions building packet bytes. Fix: Add assertions or explicit None checks before constructing byte arrays.
